page.content: flex flex-col min-h-screen opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-300
page.breadcrumbNav: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-[5%] pt-4 pb-2 overflow-x-auto
page.breadcrumbList: flex flex-nowrap items-center font-body text-[11px] tracking-[0.2em] text-neutral-500 whitespace-nowrap min-w-0
page.main: product-page-minimal max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-[5%] py-4 md:py-6
page.galleryBox: relative bg-white overflow-hidden border border-neutral-200 rounded-2xl shadow-sm group
page.imageCounter: absolute bottom-3 right-3 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-sm bg-neutral-900/80 text-white text-[11px] font-medium tracking-wide
page.navBtn: absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 rounded-full bg-white/95 border border-neutral-200 opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:bg-white text-neutral-600 hover:text-neutral-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-neutral-900 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
page.navBtnNext: absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 p-3 rounded-full bg-white/95 border border-neutral-200 opacity-80 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-all duration-200 shadow-sm hover:bg-white text-neutral-600 hover:text-neutral-900 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-neutral-900 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-30 disabled:cursor-not-allowed
page.thumbStrip: flex gap-3 overflow-x-auto pb-1 pt-1 snap-x scrollbar-hide
page.thumbBtn: relative flex-none aspect-square w-24 overflow-hidden snap-start border-2 rounded-lg border-neutral-200 hover:border-neutral-400 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-neutral-900 focus:ring-offset-2 bg-neutral-50
page.productTitle: font-headline text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-neutral-900 mb-1 uppercase
page.reviewRow: flex items-center gap-2 font-body text-sm text-neutral-500
page.descriptionSection: rounded-2xl bg-white border border-neutral-200 overflow-hidden shadow-sm
page.descriptionHeaderTitle: font-headline text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-neutral-600 flex items-center gap-3
page.descriptionHeaderIcon: w-9 h-9 rounded-lg bg-neutral-100 flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0
page.descriptionContentInner: rounded-lg bg-neutral-50 border border-neutral-200 shadow-sm overflow-hidden
page.descriptionContent: prose prose-sm max-w-none overflow-hidden transition-all duration-300 text-neutral-700
page.descriptionOverlay: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-24 pointer-events-none bg-gradient-to-t from-white via-white/90 to-transparent
page.showMoreBtn: font-body inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-[11px] font-medium tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-neutral-700 hover:text-neutral-900 bg-neutral-50 hover:bg-neutral-100 px-5 py-2.5 rounded-sm border border-neutral-200 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-neutral-900 focus:ring-offset-2
page.detailInfoBox: flex items-center gap-3 px-4 py-3 rounded-lg bg-white border border-neutral-200 shadow-sm border-l-4 border-l-neutral-400
page.detailInfoIcon: flex items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-neutral-100 flex-shrink-0
page.relatedTitle: font-headline text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-neutral-900 mb-4 uppercase
page.relatedCardRoot: group product-card flex flex-col h-full bg-white rounded-md overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 border border-neutral-200 hover:border-neutral-300
page.relatedCardMedia: relative aspect-[3/4] min-h-[200px] overflow-hidden bg-neutral-50 flex items-center justify-center
page.relatedCardNoImageWrap: w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-neutral-50
page.relatedCardSaleBadge: absolute top-2 left-2 bg-neutral-900 text-white text-[10px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] px-2 py-1 rounded-sm
page.relatedCardTitle: text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.08em] text-neutral-900 group-hover:text-neutral-700 transition-colors line-clamp-2 leading-snug mb-2
page.relatedCardArrow: text-neutral-500 group-hover:text-neutral-900 group-hover:translate-x-0.5 transition-all duration-200 flex-shrink-0
page.galleryColumnWrap: w-full min-w-0 lg:col-span-2 lg:sticky lg:top-24 lg:self-start
page.imageGridWrap: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-2 w-full min-w-0 lg:col-span-2 lg:sticky lg:top-24 lg:self-start
page.imageGridItem: relative w-full min-w-0 aspect-square overflow-hidden rounded border border-neutral-200 bg-neutral-50

luxuryProductStyle.title: font-headline text-3xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-neutral-900 mb-2 uppercase

related.title: font-headline text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-neutral-900 mb-6 uppercase
